commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the Discord gateway IDENTIFY wait path so a null `this.ws` returns without emitting or reconnecting, a non-open socket schedules reconnect, and gateway tests cover the null-socket case.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: hold `sharedGatewayIdentifyLimiter`, deliver HELLO, then clear `this.ws` before the wait resumes; current main enters the null-socket branch and emits an error without scheduling from that branch. I did not establish a live Discord READY outage reproduction.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed because the remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof from their Discord setup, not a narrow code repair automation can produce.

target.title: fix(discord): skip reconnect when ws is null during identify concurrency wait (#79794)
